ogTitle: Kilsyth South vs Kimbolton: Climate Safety

heading: Kilsyth South vs Kimbolton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kilsyth South, Victoria and Kimbolton, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kilsyth South has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kimbolton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kilsyth South or Kimbolton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kilsyth South has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Kimbolton scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kilsyth South scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Kimbolton scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kilsyth South or Kimbolton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kilsyth South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
